steps.title: Match the claim
steps.content: The claim says activity on Neverland stops when Peter is away and begins again when he is about to return. A supporting quotation must connect the island coming to life with Peter's return.

steps.title: Reject unrelated quotations
steps.content: Choice A only describes a rock's size. Choice B describes the children's first sight of the island. Choice C says Peter was alone, but not that the island's activity depends on him. The quotation about Neverland waking into life because Peter was on his way back directly supports the claim. The answer is D.
